SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.controller

Class OrganizerController

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.controller.OrganizerController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/organizer") public class OrganizerController extends Object
REST Controller handling operations specific to Organizers.

This controller allows authenticated organizers to perform management tasks, such as registering new organizations under their control.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OrganizerController(OrganizerService controllerService, OrganizerRepository organizerRepository, OrganizationRepository organizationRepository)

    Description

    Deletes a membership from the Organization's member list.

  • Constructor Details

    • OrganizerController

      public OrganizerController(OrganizerService controllerService, OrganizerRepository organizerRepository, OrganizationRepository organizationRepository)

  • Method Details

    • getAllOrganizers

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getAllOrganizers(@RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Retrieve a paginated list of all organizers.
      Parameters:
      page - The number of the page to retrieve (0-based index)
      Returns:
      A ResponseEntity containing a Page of Organizers or an error status

    • getOrganizerById

      @GetMapping("/me") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getOrganizerById(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Retrieve a specific organizer by their ID.
      Parameters:
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the Organizer or 404 Not Found

    • registerOrganization

      @PostMapping("/registerOrganization") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> registerOrganization(@RequestBody OrganizationDTO organizationDTO, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers a new Organization linked to the currently authenticated Organizer.
      Parameters:
      organizationDTO - The details of the organization to be created.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The created OrganizationDTO if successful, or an error message otherwise.

    • registerEvent

      @PostMapping("/registerEvent") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> registerEvent(@RequestBody EventDTO eventDTO, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers a new Event created by the authenticated Organizer.
      Parameters:
      eventDTO - The details of the event to be created.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details.
      Returns:
      The created EventDTO if successful.

    • updateOrganizer

      @PutMapping("/update") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> updateOrganizer(@RequestBody OrganizerDTO organizerDTO, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Updates the data of the authenticated Organizer.
      Parameters:
      organizerDTO - The updated details of the organizer to be updated.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizerDTO if successful, or an error message otherwise.

    • deleteOrganizationMembership

      @DeleteMapping("organization/{organizationName}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> deleteOrganizationMembership(@PathVariable String organizationName, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Deletes a membership from the Organization's member list.
      Parameters:
      organizationName - The name of the Organization the authenticated Organizer wants to delete their membership from.
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's details (injected by Spring Security).
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizerDTO if successful, or an error message otherwise.
